'''Natt Bordo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] guard who lived in [[Desolation Alley]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was wanted by the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] for skimming profits from a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was collected by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
This character is a bounty target in the game ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', worth 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive. The player has the option of killing him or collecting him alive.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
